<!-- START AUTOGENERATED KEY ELEMENTS -->
<b>USCDI+ Quality Elements:</b>
<ul>
<li>category: (USCDI+ Quality) product-problem | product-quality | product-use-error | wrong-dose | incorrect-prescribing-information | wrong-technique | wrong-route-of-administration | wrong-rate | wrong-duration | wrong-time | expired-drug | medical-device-use-error | problem-different-manufacturer | unsafe-physical-environment</li>
<li>event: (USCDI+ Quality) Type of the event itself in relation to the subject</li>
<li>date: (USCDI+ Quality)</li>
<li>detected: (USCDI+ Quality) When the event was detected</li>
<li>recordedDate: (USCDI+ Quality) When the event was recorded</li>
<li>suspectEntity.instance: (USCDI+ Quality) Refers to the specific entity that caused the adverse event</li>
</ul>
<!-- END AUTOGENERATED KEY ELEMENTS -->
